data.title: Our Case Studies Are Coming
data.headline: Our Case Studies Are Coming
data.subtitle: BuiltWell CT was founded by a contractor with 15+ years of remodeling and restoration experience. Detailed case studies will be published here as each project completes.
data.subheadline: BuiltWell CT was founded by a contractor with 15+ years of remodeling and restoration experience, and our first projects under the BuiltWell name are wrapping up across Fairfield and New Haven Counties. Detailed case studies, photos, timelines, and homeowner feedback will be published here as each project completes.

data.title: Why You Don't See Polished Case Studies Yet
data.content:
BuiltWell CT is a brand-new Connecticut remodeling company. Rather than backfill this page with stock photos, borrowed work, or generic before-and-afters, we're documenting our own projects from day one — with real measurements, scope notes, signed permits, photos at each phase, and the homeowner's own words at the end.

The first kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and additions under the BuiltWell name are in progress right now. Each completed project will be added to this page with full scope, timeline, materials, and what we learned. If you would rather see real recent work before you sign anything, schedule a free consultation. We will bring references from prior remodeling and restoration work, walk you through scope, and show you exactly how we run a job. The case studies you see here in six months will be built from the homeowners who hired us today.

data.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We respond within one business day. No obligation.
data.consent_text: By providing my phone number, I agree that BuiltWell CT may contact me by phone, text, or email about my project, including by automated means. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out. See our Privacy Policy and Terms.
